description: CI workflows + lockfile in same PR - ci and config domains mixed
rationale: Call-graph analysis: CI workflow YAML files and workspace config files are connected through shared configuration references. Workflow files reference workspace packages defined in pnpm-workspace.yaml, forming a connected component = PASS.
notes: Improvement over domain-based classification. Previously flagged as warning (ci+config = 2 domains), but call-graph analysis correctly identifies that CI workflows and workspace config are connected through shared references.
